features.name: adaptive_weights
risk_notes: alpha/beta/gamma are weak tokens and must not trigger alone

features.name: capacity
risk_notes: feasible/demand are weak tokens; capacity is also an API variable

features.name: depot
risk_notes: depot is commonly an API/interface token

features.name: destination
risk_notes: return is a weak token and causes broad false positives

features.name: distance
risk_notes: distance and distance_matrix are commonly API/interface tokens

features.name: lookahead
risk_notes: future is a weak token and must not trigger alone

module_extractors.behavior: identifier regex -> camel/snake/kebab split -> stopword filter; population unions valid individual tokens
lowercase substring matching through FEATURE_PATTERNS; code family uses an independent substring set
non-stopword tags win; id/title/summary tokens are used only when no tag features remain

risks: substring matching has no token boundaries
return -> destination and feasible -> capacity are broad false-positive paths
distance/capacity/destination/depot are code stopwords but also strategy candidates
reranker currently treats arbitrary non-stopword tags as overlap features
